_metadata.description: Published parameter values used for CTB simulations
_metadata.purpose: Audit trail — every number has a source
_metadata.author: Raphael Brandão

zhang_2017_mCRPC.source: Zhang J, Cunningham JJ, Brown JS, Gatenby RA. Nat Commun. 2017;8:1816

r_T_plus.derivation: LNCaP cell line doubling time, scaled to 10% of in vitro

r_T_P.derivation: H295R cell line doubling time, scaled to 10%

r_T_minus.derivation: PC-3 cell line doubling time, scaled to 10%

parameters.note: Three-population model (T+, TP, T-). Our 2-population model uses r_S ≈ r_T_plus, r_R from range of T_P to T_minus

zhang_2022_elife.note: Updated outcomes. Deviations from model-predicted timing correlated with worse outcomes.

strobl_2024_cancer_res.source: Strobl MAR et al. Cancer Res. 2024;84(11):1929

parameters.fitting: Fitted to 7 patients from Bruchovsky et al. intermittent androgen suppression trial
parameters.note: DRL framework trained on virtual patients generated from these parameters

enriquez_navas_2016.source: Enriquez-Navas PM et al. Sci Transl Med. 2016;8(327):327ra24
enriquez_navas_2016.note: Preclinical breast cancer adaptive therapy. Parameters adapted for HER2+ demonstration case.

ctb_simulation_parameters.description: Parameters used in this study, derived from above sources

justification.r_R: Lower than r_S to reflect cost of resistance (standard assumption in AT literature)
justification.alpha_RS: 1.5: strong competitive suppression (required for AT benefit per Strobl 2024)
justification.d_S: Calibrated to produce ~50% tumor decline at ~120 days (consistent with abiraterone response)
justification.d_R: Near-zero: resistant cells minimally affected by abiraterone
justification.S0_R0: 2.3% initial resistant fraction (within 1-10% range used in AT literature)

virtual_cohort_sampling.justification: Ranges span biologically plausible space per Strobl 2024 and AT literature review
